overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded protagonist walking through an ancient Egyptian temple gateway adorned with hieroglyphic reliefs and monumental statues. The character passes through a sunlit stone courtyard lined with potted palms, then turns to survey the temple complex revealing obelisks and sphinx statues in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Egyptian temple gateway with monumental arch and hieroglyphic reliefs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the temple gateway, approaching the monumental archway flanked by seated pharaoh statues

notable_agents.action: child in white clothing running past on the left side of the entrance

entered.detail: massive stone archway with colorful hieroglyphic reliefs depicting figures and symbols
large dark stone statue of a seated pharaoh with nemes headdress
large dark stone statue of a seated pharaoh flanking the entrance
large decorative palm tree in ornate black and gold planter
large decorative palm tree in ornate planter with geometric patterns
stone walls covered with painted hieroglyphics and ancient Egyptian artwork

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks forward through a sunlit ancient Egyptian temple complex, approaching a monumental gateway adorned with hieroglyphic reliefs. Two large seated pharaoh statues flank the entrance, while potted date palms line the stone-paved path. A child runs past on the left as the character moves steadily toward the archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple courtyard with obelisk and sphinx monuments

events.description: character stops walking forward and begins turning left to survey the surroundings
camera turns toward the sun creating strong backlighting and lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: turning around to survey the temple courtyard, looking toward the obelisk and sphinx statues in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark obelisk with hieroglyphic inscriptions standing in the courtyard
two large sphinx statues guarding the distant temple entrance
wooden poles strung with white fabric banners fluttering in the wind

segments.scene_description: The character completes a turn to face back toward the temple entrance, revealing a sunlit courtyard with a tall obelisk on the left and sphinx statues in the distance. The camera catches the bright sun creating a backlight effect, while the ceremonial banners flutter overhead. The monumental gateway now appears in the background to the right as the character surveys the ancient complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a steady approach toward a monumental temple gateway and concludes with a panoramic survey of the surrounding ancient complex. It begins as the protagonist walks along a stone-paved path lined with potted date palms, passing a running child while moving toward an archway flanked by two large seated pharaoh statues and intricate hieroglyphic reliefs. As the character reaches the gateway, the camera smoothly pivots in a wide turn to face back toward the entrance. The scene then opens up to reveal a sunlit courtyard where a tall obelisk stands to the left and sphinx statues loom in the distance under fluttering ceremonial banners. Finally, the perspective shifts to capture the bright sun creating a backlight effect, leaving the monumental gateway positioned in the background to the right.
